statement: In every magma, Equation 2986 (`x = ((y * (z * x)) * w) * y`) implies Equation 1229 (`x = x * (((x * y) * x) * y)`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0328
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op (op (op y (op z x)) w) y)) :
    ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op x (op (op (op x y) x) y))
